context: Bitcoin and altcoins retreated 2-3.5% in the past 24 hours amid profit-taking following the White House's push toward July 4 CLARITY Act passage. The stablecoin agreement breakthrough has removed a major legislative obstacle, but near-term consolidation prevails as traders await Senate markup confirmation and macro clarity.

tickers.thesis: Post-CLARITY stablecoin breakthrough removes regulatory headwind; consolidation around $80.8k before re-test of $85k resistance. Long-term thesis intact with July 4 legislative catalyst ahead.
levels: Major supply zone; next bull target

setup.stop: $77,800 (money management safe stop below weekly support)
setup.invalidation: Close below $76,000 or reversal on CLARITY Act political headwind

insights.title: CLARITY Act Breakthrough: Regulatory Overhang Lifts
insights.body: The stablecoin deal reached May 4–6 removes a major negotiating obstacle to full CLARITY Act passage by July 4. This shifts the probability from 60% to 80%+. For XRP and BTC, this is a net positive: institutional capital can now price in a post-legislation risk premium. Watch Senate markup schedule (likely mid-May) for confirmation.

insights.title: XRP Leverage Flush Complete; Capitulation Low In?
insights.body: CME XRP open interest collapsed while price held $1.32–$1.41 range, confirming retail/short liquidations. ICT teaches that capitulation flush + whale accumulation (90M tokens to Coinbase April 13) + low volatility = setup for wide-open directional move. Next impulse likely up; entry $1.38–$1.40 with tight stop $1.30.

insights.title: BTC & ETH Divergence: Alt Season Lagging
insights.body: ETH underperformed BTC by 1.5% (24h), signaling weak alt-season conviction. DeFi regulatory overhang and stablecoin debate weighed on Ethereum more than Bitcoin. Once CLARITY clarity confirmed (post-Senate markup), expect mean reversion and alt-season re-ignition. ETH entry $2,280–$2,320 offers asymmetric risk/reward.

insights.title: Whale Accumulation & Macro Catalysts Align
insights.body: Institutional buyer signatures (whale moves, CME OI flush, stablecoin deal) combined with July 4 CLARITY catalyst create a compressed spring. Range-bound consolidation through May 7–15, then directional breakout on Senate markup confirmation. Bias is LONG for BTC, XRP; NEUTRAL with upside bias for ETH.
